cases.prompt: Make a mind map as a .canvas file for my Obsidian vault.

assertions.text: Creates a valid .canvas file following the JSON Canvas Spec 1.0
Produces top-level nodes and edges arrays with nodes carrying id, type, x, y, width, height
Validates that every edge's fromNode and toNode reference existing node IDs

cases.prompt: 캔버스 만들어줘. .canvas 파일로 플로우차트 그려서 노드 연결해줘.

assertions.text: Generates unique 16-character hex IDs for nodes and edges
Connects nodes via edges with fromNode/toNode (and optional fromSide/toSide and label)
